install.note: Python-based agent by Nous Research. Supports Linux, macOS, and Windows. After install, run 'hermes --version' to verify (on macOS/Linux you may need 'source ~/.bashrc' first).

cli.description: Hermes uses 'hermes chat -q' for non-interactive oneshot mode.
cli.role_mechanism: Hermes uses SOUL.md at ~/.hermes/SOUL.md for agent identity. ezSphere writes role content here; Hermes auto-detects changes on next session.
cli.output_format: With --quiet flag, outputs clean text response only.
cli.note: Hermes is Python-based, by Nous Research. Supports 200+ models via OpenRouter, plus MiniMax, Kimi, OpenAI, Anthropic, custom endpoints.
